message:
Fix missing resolve_repo_spec source in test_unit_repo_list.sh

Tests for dedupe_repos and detect_collisions now use resolve_repo_spec
internally, so the test file needs to source this function.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 source_ru_function "parse_repo_url"
+source_ru_function "resolve_repo_spec"
 source_ru_function "url_to_local_path"
 source_ru_function "dedupe_repos"
 source_ru_function "detect_collisions"
